authority_rule: Every authority_effect must be none. Fields may preserve future data but cannot change planning, writes or authority.

contracts.name: SourceManifest
contracts.reason: All compilation and guides must preserve source provenance, privacy, freshness and use boundaries.
contracts.first_test: withheld private source never appears in public output
contracts.future_migration: add richer freshness and disclosure profiles under namespaced extensions

contracts.name: ProjectModel
contracts.reason: The compiler needs a normalized project understanding before SeedSpec generation.
contracts.first_test: conflicting mission statements remain visible
contracts.future_migration: support reverse compilation and semantic diff

contracts.name: SeedSpec
contracts.reason: This is the reviewed build contract for deterministic generation and retrofit.
contracts.first_test: same SeedSpec produces same canonical hash and plan
contracts.future_migration: support lineage, lifecycle, projections and signed bundles

contracts.name: GenerationPlan
contracts.reason: No write or retrofit decision can happen without explicit path actions.
contracts.first_test: existing AGENTS.md becomes propose_update, not overwrite
contracts.future_migration: add semantic diff and migration planning

contracts.name: ActivationReport
contracts.reason: A Project Kernel is not active until required files and references validate.
contracts.first_test: activation blocked when source atlas path is missing
contracts.future_migration: add CI attestations and signed bundle evidence

contracts.name: SkillRegistry
contracts.reason: Skills and capability candidates need state, risk, evidence and promotion boundaries.
contracts.first_test: registry evidence paths resolve
contracts.future_migration: add capability composition and conflict metadata

contracts.name: GuideSet
contracts.reason: RepoKernel must serve user and coder understanding; guides are generated/applied projections of canonical contracts.
contracts.first_test: user guide and coder guide cite canonical fields without redefining authority
contracts.future_migration: role projections and selective disclosure profiles

contracts.name: IntentContract
contracts.reason: Intent needs stable references, but full runtime-facing contract can wait until A1/cycle work.
contracts.first_test: intent reference cannot amend SeedSpec automatically
contracts.future_migration: promote to full schema after A1 proof

contracts.name: ContextSnapshot
contracts.reason: Needed for A1 proof, not for Direct Start or retrofit core.
contracts.first_test: snapshot contains hashes and excludes secrets

contracts.name: TensionReport
contracts.reason: Needed to prove observe-and-propose without implementing cycle runtime.
contracts.first_test: no material tension emits no_cycle

contracts.name: ResultantPacket
contracts.reason: Carries recursive output for A1 and future cognition; core only needs to preserve references.
contracts.first_test: packet cannot approve its own implementation

contracts.name: AutonomyPolicy
contracts.reason: Autonomy axis must be explicit but no autonomous behavior ships in Phase 1.
contracts.first_test: A1 cannot write or increase authority

contracts.name: CycleRecord
contracts.reason: No runtime cycle or event daemon in Phase 1.
contracts.first_test: not applicable in Phase 1

contracts.name: FitnessContract
contracts.reason: Evaluation refs should exist, but full fitness is later A1/A2 work.
contracts.first_test: fitness reference cannot be changed by evaluated packet

contracts.name: ResultantEvaluation
contracts.reason: Needed for A1 no-write proof, not core generator.
contracts.first_test: evaluator can reject ResultantPacket

contracts.name: LearningDelta
contracts.reason: Memory delta is core concept, but full metabolism belongs later.
contracts.first_test: delta preserves accepted facts only

contracts.name: EvolutionProposal
contracts.reason: Capability forge and self-evolution are not Phase 1.
contracts.first_test: not applicable in Phase 1

contracts.name: RuntimeManifest
contracts.reason: L3 is contract-only and executable runtime is deferred.
contracts.first_test: no runtime dependency in core

contracts.name: DepartmentContract
contracts.reason: Departmental topology must be preserved as optional, not required for Direct Start, synthesis or retrofit.
contracts.first_test: core ignores department extension for planning authority

contracts.name: SynapticEvent
contracts.reason: Cascade semantics are useful later but must not become transport or authority now.
contracts.first_test: event extension cannot trigger writes
contracts.future_migration: cycle/department package after bounded event tests
